scripts.build: pnpm --filter @fodmapp/domain build && pnpm --filter @fodmapp/api-client build && pnpm --filter @fodmapp/ui build && next build
scripts.analyze: pnpm --filter @fodmapp/domain build && pnpm --filter @fodmapp/api-client build && pnpm --filter @fodmapp/ui build && ANALYZE=true next build --webpack
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @fodmapp/domain build && pnpm --filter @fodmapp/api-client build && pnpm --filter @fodmapp/ui build && next typegen && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @fodmapp/domain build && pnpm --filter @fodmapp/api-client build && pnpm --filter @fodmapp/ui build && vitest run
